CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC HEALTH
INSPECTION REPORT

Date: 2026-04-15
Inspector: J. Smith
Address: 123 Main St

VIOLATIONS OBSERVED:
1. § 581(b)(13) - Rodents observed in basement. Structural gaps around pipes.
2. § 581(b)(2) - Overgrown vegetation at rear property line.
3. § 581(b)(1) - Accumulation of garbage in side yard.

Corrective Actions: Seal gaps, trim vegetation, remove garbage.

INSPECTION REPORT
Date: 2026-05-01
Address: 456 Oak Ave

Found pigeons nesting on roof. Citation: SFHC § 581(b)(7).
Also found mold in unit 4. Citation: § 581(b)(6).
